word: G2177 - ἐφάλλομαι - ephállomai - ef-al'-lom-ahee - Leap on

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐφάλλομαι

- Transliteration: Ephallomai

- Phonetic: ef-al'-lom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to leap upon, spring upon

- Origin: from G1909 and G242

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and G242; to spring upon: - leap on.
